name: Reactive ATP algorithm for AT/AF reduction
description: An exclusive algorithm in Azure MRI SureScan pacemakers designed to reduce the risk and duration of atrial tachycardia/atrial fibrillation (AT/AF) episodes. It demonstrates a 36% relative reduction in AT/AF episodes lasting more than 7 days, based on clinical evidence. The algorithm is limited to patients with AT/AF and is only available on compatible devices, with effectiveness bounded by device compatibility and patient selection.
